summary: Prior FIX verified. Manifest now declares exactly the 7 inline F2P gates that test.sh awards (g1..g7), weights sum to 1.00, mirror test.sh add_reward calls 1:1. No orphan/upstream gates remain. No P2P_REGRESSION verdict bug present (test.sh uses pure inline scoring, no upstream tail / weighted-replace formula). Anti-over-fit checks pass.

verification.p2p_regression_note: test.sh has zero P2P_REGRESSION gates and no upstream-tail / weighted-replace formula. Reward is pure inline accumulation. No p2p_failed verdict to mis-check.

early_exit_audit.verdict: All four are legitimate hard-zero gates (setup/sanity/no-op). None is a hidden weighted P2P that could mis-zero a correct fix — the schema block exists in the buggy baseline, so line 76 only fires on actively broken code.

f2p_quality.behavioral_share: All 7 gates are structural-behavioral (regex/AST checks of the actual code, not text-match in instructions). No tautological gates.
f2p_quality.implementation_agnosticism: G3 accepts either pub field syntax across 3 structs (full=0.20, 2/3=0.10 partial credit). G4 accepts either `.or(source.billing_processor_id)` chained or shorthand struct literal. G7 is fan-out (≥4/5 critical files), not a specific impl path.
narrowness_concerns: G2 enforces Nullable<Varchar> exactly — narrow but the instruction defines the column as optional, and the diesel schema vocab is fixed.
G5 enforces Option<...MerchantConnectorAccountId> — narrow but the field semantically references a connector account, this is the canonical hyperswitch type.
Field name billing_processor_id is canonical (matches PR title 'configure default billing processor') and is the obvious noun choice.
f2p_quality.leakage: instruction.md does NOT name billing_processor_id, business_profile table, or MerchantConnectorAccountId verbatim — agent must derive from PR description + repo exploration. No hidden solution artifacts in Dockerfile.

scoring_formula_compliance.rationale: Pure inline accumulation with sum(F2P)=1.00 is mathematically equivalent to weighted-replace where inner_share=0. No legacy/upstream reward to subsume. Bounded to [0,1] by construction since hard-exit zeros are handled before any add_reward.

notes: Re-verification of prior batch fix. Manifest+test.sh are tight; weights balanced (max 0.20, no dominant-gate R006); no orphan gates; no P2P regression bug; no over-fit gates. Single-turn task (user_simulation_prompt has 0 substantive triggers — original session has 96 tool_result envelopes and 1 real human msg = the instruction). Task is in clean state.
